news_items.headline: Mark Vientos continues to deliver for Mets amid recent hot stretch at plate
news_items.summary: In desperate need of someone to step up and carry their shorthanded offense, Mark Vientos continues to be the man for the Mets.

news_items.headline: Dodgers do just enough to outlast Braves in opener
news_items.summary: LOS ANGELES — The Dodgers clawed and scrapped their way to some offense against Chris Sale to get the better of the Atlanta Braves 3-1 in Friday night’s series opener between perennial National League powerhouses at Dodger Stadium. The Dodgers had only five hits in seven innings against Sale, but made them count. Teoscar Hernández […]
